aids.title: TMMS - AI Fathers
aids.content:
**T**uring - Test and theoretical foundations
**M**cCarthy - Coined 'AI', created Lisp
**M**insky - MIT AI Lab, perceptron critique
**S**imon - Logic Theorist, cognitive approach

"TMMS sounds like 'teams' - it took a TEAM to start AI!"

aids.title: AI Winters as Economic Cycles
aids.content:
Think of AI history like economic boom-bust cycles:
- **Boom 1 (1956-74):** Exciting new technology, over-investment
- **Bust 1 (1974-80):** Reality check, funding cuts
- **Boom 2 (1980-87):** Expert systems revival
- **Bust 2 (1987-93):** Systems too brittle
- **Current Boom (2012+):** Deep learning, but will there be another winter?

aids.title: Key Years to Remember
aids.content:
**1950** - Turing Test paper
**1956** - Dartmouth Conference (AI born)
**1969** - Perceptrons book (XOR limit)
**1997** - Deep Blue beats Kasparov
**2012** - AlexNet (deep learning revolution)
**2016** - AlphaGo beats Lee Sedol
